summary: A recorded clip of an outdoor press event, posted by the account, with an 'OFF THE PRESS' watermark in the upper right. A man with gray hair in a light blue open-collar shirt speaks into a microphone outdoors on what appear to be building steps, with several people in business attire standing behind and around him. Burned-in captions are not present in the sampled frame. The spoken remarks concern ICE enforcement and immigration policy. The audio is the speaker's remarks at the event.

script.scene: A man with gray hair in a light blue shirt speaks into a microphone outdoors on building steps, with several people in business attire standing behind and beside him. 'OFF THE PRESS' watermark upper right.
The same speaker continues his remarks at the microphone in the same setting.
